title: Next.js App Router Selection
insight: App Router chosen for server components and file-based routing. Appropriate for a dashboard with mostly static data rendering.

title: JSON File Data Strategy
insight: JSON files chosen over database for MVP simplicity. Appropriate for read-only dashboard with <100 data entries. Will need migration path if data grows.
detectionSignal: Data storage approach matches current scale
prevention: IF data exceeds 1000 entries THEN evaluate database migration

title: Tailwind CSS Design System
insight: Custom Tailwind theme configured to match portfolio site design tokens. Ensures visual consistency across Stan's client-facing properties.

title: Vercel Deployment Target
insight: Vercel selected for zero-config Next.js deployment. Free tier sufficient for demo traffic. Custom domain can be added later.

title: No Authentication for MVP
insight: Auth deliberately excluded from MVP scope. Dashboard shows non-sensitive analysis data. Will need auth before sharing client-specific results externally.
detectionSignal: Public dashboard contains project analysis data
prevention: IF dashboard will display client-confidential data THEN implement auth before sharing URL

title: Card-Based Layout Pattern
insight: Card-based layout chosen for information density and scanability. PMO leaders need to quickly assess project health at a glance.

title: Color-Coded Status System
insight: Green/amber/red/navy color coding for gate statuses provides instant visual assessment. Consistent with traffic-light patterns familiar to PMO audiences.
detectionSignal: Color system aligned with PMO conventions

title: Mobile-First Responsive Design
insight: Responsive design ensures dashboard is usable on tablets during meetings and on phones for quick checks. Sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile.

title: Per-Project Data Organization
insight: Data organized in /data/[project-id]/ folders. Each project has agents.json, knowledge-base.json, governance.json, and assessment.json. Supports multi-project capability.

title: localStorage for MVP State
insight: Governance status updates and context setup saved to localStorage. Sufficient for single-user demo but not for multi-user or persistent state.
detectionSignal: State management uses browser-local storage only
prevention: IF multiple users need to see governance updates THEN migrate state to server-side storage

title: CI/CD via Vercel Git Integration
insight: Push-to-deploy via GitHub integration. Every push to main triggers a production build. Preview deployments for branches.

title: Scope Creep Risk from Feature Ideas
insight: Primary risk is adding features beyond MVP scope during development. Sprint boundaries and clear deliverables mitigate this.
detectionSignal: Feature ideas emerging faster than sprint capacity
prevention: IF new feature idea emerges during sprint THEN add to backlog, do not interrupt current sprint
